title: A. gossypii smFISH CLN3
author: Alexander Mayer
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: smFISH Data of the A. gossypii cyclin CLN3, supporting the work "The Role of RNA Phase Separation in Noise Suppression". Each of the 15 hyphae imaged have four associated data sets: the raw (deconvolved) image data, detected RNA locations, hyphal masks, and nuclear masks.
steps_raw: smFISH Data of the A. gossypii cyclin CLN3, supporting the work "The Role of RNA Phase Separation in Noise Suppression". Each of the 15 hyphae imaged have four associated data sets: the raw (deconvolved) image data, detected RNA locations, hyphal masks, and nuclear masks.
